name: SCP 3008-2: IKEA Staff
description:
The Ikea staff are the inhabitants of SCP-3008, otherwise known as the Infinite Ikea. They make sure things are smooth and in order as long as you leave them alone, but when night falls, you'd better hide.

(If desire some specific ones, some staff members names are: Flint (Cantaloupe Skin), Colt (Brown Skin), Ryker (Pink Skin), Liam (Vanilla Skin), and Gunnar (Watermelon Skin)
creator: Amawolf
